current.summary: Executed full hooks behavior research: 6 phases, 20+ subagents, 2,388 lines across 15 new research files. Validated hooks spec v0.1.0 against 8 spec agents + 6 non-spec agents. Found 27 spec errors (3 critical). Multi-persona panel review applied.

activeWork.description: Hooks behavior research — COMPLETE. Ready for spec patching and commit.
activeWork.progress: All 6 phases COMPLETE. Phase 1: spec validation (4 groups x 8 agents, 3 categories). Phase 2: runtime behavior (D1-D6 for 8 agents). Phase 3: security audit (E1-E5). Phase 4: non-spec agents (6 agents). Phase 5: validation (4 validators, 51 VALID / 7 PARTIALLY VALID / 0 INVALID, all issues fixed). Phase 6: deliverables compiled + 5-persona panel review with 10 action items applied.

git.lastCommit: 26c73f7 feat: add ADR awareness system with INDEX.md and tiered enforcement

recentDecisions: Hooks spec v0.1.0 has 27 confirmed errors: 3 critical, 6 high, 13 medium, 5 low
VS Code Copilot UserPromptSubmit is OBSERVE, not PREVENT — critical security finding
Gemini CLI and Cursor both support input_rewrite — spec incorrectly said they don't
agent_stop 'retry' relabeled to 'continue' — mechanism is prevent-termination, not automatic retry
Kiro IDE vs CLI: both use camelCase; IDE before_prompt=prevent, CLI=observe
Kiro event names must use camelCase identifiers, not display names (fileEdited not 'File Save')
OpenCode converter is out of scope — requires TypeScript source generation, not config transformation
Kiro IDE is documentation-only, not a converter output target
Copilot CLI ephemeral runner is NOT a sandbox — provides run isolation only
Amazon Q, Cline, Augment recommended for spec addition (High priority); gptme, Pi (Medium)
nextSteps: Commit all research outputs (hooks behavior checks — 15 new files, ~2,400 lines)
Apply spec v0.1.1 patch corrections to docs/spec/hooks/hooks.md (Section 7.4 event table, Section 8.2 blocking matrix, Section 9 capability matrices)
Fix toolmap.go Kiro event mappings (File Save → fileEdited, etc.)
Verify CC ErrorOccurred event exists before including in spec patch
Apply v0.2 architectural changes: split Kiro provider, add stop_failure canonical, rename retry→continue, add runtime behavior section, add security section

context.notes: This session executed the full hooks behavior research plan from README.md. Pipeline: 4 parallel Phase 1 research agents → 3 parallel Phase 2+4 agents + 1 Phase 3 agent → 4 parallel Phase 5 validation agents → 1 Phase 6 panel agent. Total: 20+ subagent dispatches. The validation round found 7 partially-valid findings out of 58 total, all fixed. The multi-persona panel (Spec Author, Security Reviewer, Converter Implementor, Hook Author, Enterprise Admin) produced 10 action items, 7 of which were applied to the deliverables. Key deliverables: 00-hook-behavior-matrix.md (corrected master matrix), spec-validation-report.md (27 errors catalogued with severity), spec-influences.md (v0.2 roadmap with converter rules and panel feedback applied).
